FrontendAIAnalyzer.FallbackBehavior: Emits empty arrays or skips service generation if absent.

FrontendGenerator (templates/frontend.ts.FallbackBehavior: If an entity is absent for a page, falls back to a static string template placeholder.
FrontendGenerator (templates/frontend.ts.BreakRisk: Low (Does not crash, but destroys capability)

HybridGenerator.FallbackBehavior: Generates whatever is listed. If entities are absent, it disables database and Prisma generation.

GenerationRouter.FallbackBehavior: Passes the blueprint directly into project memory.
